scripts.predev: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const ok=['vite','vue','axios'].every(p=>{try{fs.accessSync('node_modules/'+p+'/package.json');return true}catch{return false}});if(!ok){console.error('依赖不完整，将尝试 npm install');process.exit(1)}" || npm install
scripts.sync:backend-mock-json: tsx -e "import { writeFileSync, mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'; import { MOCK_RECIPES } from './src/data/recommendMock.ts'; const out='../campus-diet-backend/src/main/resources/bootstrap/mock-recipes.json'; mkdirSync('../campus-diet-backend/src/main/resources/bootstrap',{recursive:true}); writeFileSync(out,JSON.stringify(MOCK_RECIPES,null,2),'utf8'); console.log('wrote',out,MOCK_RECIPES.length,'items');"
